mapper.select: SELECT gr.id, #{userId} AS user_id, NULL AS opponent_names, CASE WHEN gr.winner_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result, gr.score, gr.create_time AS game_time, NULL AS duration FROM game_record gr JOIN room r ON gr.room_id = r.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_player rp WHERE rp.room_id = gr.room_id AND rp.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY gr.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(gr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date_key, SUM(CASE WHEN gr.winner_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN gr.winner_id != #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, COUNT(*) AS total FROM game_record gr JOIN room r ON gr.room_id = r.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_player rp WHERE rp.room_id = gr.room_id AND rp.user_id = #{userId} ) AND gr.create_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(gr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date_key ASC

SELECT HOUR(gr.create_time) AS hour_key, SUM(CASE WHEN gr.winner_id = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN gr.winner_id != #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, COUNT(*) AS total FROM game_record gr JOIN room r ON gr.room_id = r.id WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM room_player rp WHERE rp.room_id = gr.room_id AND rp.user_id = #{userId} ) AND gr.create_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY HOUR(gr.create_time) ORDER BY hour_key ASC
